search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name
`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:devicesavailabilitieschangehistory" $orgid$ | dedup device.serial | rename network.name as "Network Name" | stats count as Count by "Network Name" | sort 10 - Count

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:devicesavailabilitieschangehistory" $orgid$ details.new{}.value="offline" | dedup device.serial | rename device.name as "Device Name", device.serial as "Device Serial" | stats count as Count by "Device Name", "Device Serial" | sort 10 - Count

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:devicesavailabilitieschangehistory" $orgid$ | dedup device.serial | rename details.new{}.value as "New Status", details.old{}.value as "Old Status" network.name as "Network Name", device.name as "Device Name", ts as "Status Updated At" , device.serial as "Device Serial" | table "Device Name","Device Serial", "Network Name", "Status Updated At" , "Old Status", "New Status"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:devicesavailabilitieschangehistory" $orgid$ | dedup device.serial | search details.new{}.value="$row.New Status$" details.old{}.value="$row.Old Status$" network.name="$row.Network Name$" device.name="$row.Device Name$" ts="$row.Status Updated At$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:devicesavailabilitieschangehistory" $orgid$ | dedup device.serial | rename details.new{}.value as new_status | timechart span=1h count by new_status
